purpose: Fresh public-route refresh for small smartwatch Parkinson datasets with MDS-UPDRS subitem labels after TLVMC/DeFOG and cache-provenance branches.

routes.name: Monipar
routes.modality: single consumer smartwatch triaxial accelerometer at 50 Hz
routes.labels: exercise-level MDS-UPDRS subitem scores for the supervised group only; no confirmed total Part III
routes.verdict: Public consumer-smartwatch subitem dataset. It lacks total MDS-UPDRS Part III, lacks a full T1 9-14 composite, and has only six supervised PD subjects with item labels. No preregistration, download, scaffold, or remote job is justified for the active WearGait-PD T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: BIOCLITE
routes.modality: single consumer smartwatch triaxial accelerometer and gyroscope at 50 Hz
routes.labels: per-exercise MDS-UPDRS score 0-4 when a clinical evaluation is available; no total Part III endpoint
routes.verdict: Public smartwatch follow-up to Monipar with acc+gyro and supervised/unsupervised sessions. It is useful related work for exercise-level motor subitems, but it cannot support total T3 or the full T1 items 9-14 composite. No preregistration, download, scaffold, or remote job is justified for the active WearGait-PD T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: Personalized Parkinson Project / PD Virtual Motor Exam
routes.access_status: RDSRC request-gated; data release fees may apply
routes.modality: Verily Study Watch wrist sensors during passive monitoring and PD-VME active tasks
routes.labels: MDS-UPDRS Part III at clinic visits and consensus subitem ratings for PD-VME validation subsets
routes.verdict: Strong gated Verily-watch external route and a useful peer to PPMI/Verily. It is not public or locally approved, so no scaffold, preregistration, download, or remote job is justified until a data request is approved and row-level schema is available.
